criteria.name: AI Capabilities
criteria.description: The extent and sophistication of artificial intelligence features integrated into the app, such as image generation, enhancement, and editing tools.
criteria.sources: Product documentation, user reviews, and expert analyses.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use, interface design, and user satisfaction with the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app store ratings, and usability studies.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and versatility of features offered by the app, including unique tools and functionalities.
criteria.sources: Product documentation, feature lists, and comparative analyses.

criteria.name: Popularity
criteria.description: The app's user base size, download numbers, and overall market presence.
criteria.sources: App store statistics, download counts, and market research reports.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The app's introduction of new technologies, unique features, or novel approaches to photo and video editing.
criteria.sources: Product release notes, industry news, and expert reviews.
